_id.description: Unique identifier of the procedure. Generated automatically by TheHive using the format '~<number>'.

_createdAt.description: Date-time string when the procedure was created. Converted from Unix timestamp in DD-MM-YYYYTHH:MM:SS format.

_createdBy.description: Email or username of the user who created the procedure.

_updatedAt.description: Date-time string when the procedure was last updated. Converted from Unix timestamp in DD-MM-YYYYTHH:MM:SS format.

_updatedBy.description: Email or username of the user who last updated the procedure.

patternId.description: The MITRE ATT&CK technique or sub-technique ID for this procedure (e.g., 'T1059' for Command and Scripting Interpreter, 'T1059.001' for PowerShell). Corresponds to the patternId of the linked pattern.

patternName.description: The name of the procedure pattern. This is a human-readable name corresponding to the patternId.

occurDate.description: The date and time when the procedure occurred.

tactic.description: The MITRE ATT&CK tactic associated with the procedure. Useful if the technique belongs to several tactics.

tacticLabel.description: The human-readable label of the MITRE ATT&CK tactic associated with the procedure.

description.description: A detailed description of the procedure, including context, observed behavior, and any relevant information that can help analysts understand the procedure's purpose and impact.

extraData.description: Optional fields that can be requested via the 'extraData' query parameter. These fields are not returned by default due to performance overhead. Request specific fields by adding 'extraData: ["fieldName"]' to the page operation in your query.
